memberdef.definition: typedef int(* dac_x_to_raw_fn) (uint32_t ref_mv, uint8_t resolution, uint32_t *valp)
memberdef.name: dac_x_to_raw_fn

briefdescription.para: Conversion from specified input units to raw DAC units.

detaileddescription.para: This function performs the necessary conversion to transform a physical voltage to a raw DAC value.

parameterdescription.para: the reference voltage used for the value, in millivolts.
the number of bits in the absolute value of the output.
pointer to the physical voltage value on input, and the corresponding raw output value on successful conversion. If conversion fails the stored value is left unchanged.

briefdescription.para: Configure a DAC channel.

detaileddescription.para: It is required to call this function and configure each channel before it is selected for a write request.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
If a parameter with an invalid value has been provided.
If the requested resolution is not supported.

briefdescription.para: Configure an DAC channel from a struct dac_dt_spec.

simplesect.para: A value from dac_channel_setup() or -ENOTSUP if information from Devicetree is not valid.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint8_t channel, uint32_t value)
memberdef.name: dac_write_value

briefdescription.para: Write a single value to a DAC channel.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
Number of the channel to be used.
Data to be written to DAC output registers.
If a parameter with an invalid value has been provided.

briefdescription.para: Write a single value to a DAC channel from a struct dac_dt_spec.

parameterdescription.para: Data to be written to DAC output registers.

simplesect.para: A value from dac_write_value() or -ENOTSUP if information from Devicetree is not valid.

briefdescription.para: Convert a millivolts value to a raw DAC value.
Convert a raw DAC value to microvolts.
Convert a raw DAC value to an arbitrary output unit.

parameterdescription.para: Function that converts to the final output unit.
pointer to the physical voltage value on input, and the corresponding raw output value on successful conversion. If conversion fails the stored value is left unchanged.

simplesect.para: A value from dac_x_to_raw_dt_chan or -ENOTSUP if information from Devicetree is not valid.

briefdescription.para: Convert a millivolts value to raw DAC using information stored in a struct dac_dt_spec.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the raw measurement value on input, and the corresponding millivolt value on successful conversion. If conversion fails the stored value is left unchanged.

simplesect.para: A value from dac_millivolts_to_raw() or -ENOTSUP if information from Devicetree is not valid.

briefdescription.para: Convert a microvolts value to raw DAC value using information stored in a struct dac_dt_spec.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the raw measurement value on input, and the corresponding microvolt value on successful conversion. If conversion fails the stored value is left unchanged.

simplesect.para: A value from dac_microvolts_to_raw() or -ENOTSUP if information from Devicetree is not valid.

briefdescription.para: Validate that the DAC device is ready.

simplesect.para: true if the DAC device is ready for use and false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Broadcast channel identifier for DACs that support it.

simplesect.para: Only for use in dac_write_value().

memberdef.name: DAC_CHANNEL_CFG_DT
memberdef.initializer: { \ .resolution = DT_PROP_OR(node_id, zephyr_resolution, 0), \ .buffered = DT_PROP(node_id, zephyr_buffered), \ .internal = DT_PROP(node_id, zephyr_internal), \ .channel_id = DT_REG_ADDR(node_id), \ }

briefdescription.para: Get DAC channel configuration from a given devicetree node.

detaileddescription.para: This returns a static initializer for a struct dac_channel_cfg filled with data from a given devicetree node.

simplesect.para: Static initializer for an dac_channel_cfg structure.

briefdescription.para: Get DAC io-channel information from devicetree by name.

detaileddescription.para: This returns a static initializer for an dac_dt_spec structure given a devicetree node and a channel name. The node must have the "io-channels" property defined.

simplesect.para: Static initializer for an dac_dt_spec structure.

briefdescription.para: Like DAC_DT_SPEC_GET_BY_NAME(), with a fallback to a default value.

simplesect.para: Static initializer for a struct dac_dt_spec for the property, or default_value if the node or property do not exist.

briefdescription.para: Get DAC io-channel information from a DT_DRV_COMPAT devicetree instance by name.

simplesect.para: Static initializer for an dac_dt_spec structure.

briefdescription.para: Like DAC_DT_SPEC_INST_GET_BY_NAME(), with a fallback to a default value.

simplesect.para: Static initializer for a struct dac_dt_spec for the property, or default_value if the node or property do not exist.

briefdescription.para: Get DAC io-channel information from devicetree.

detaileddescription.para: This returns a static initializer for an dac_dt_spec structure given a devicetree node and a channel index. The node must have the "io-channels" property defined.

simplesect.para: Static initializer for an dac_dt_spec structure.

briefdescription.para: Like DAC_DT_SPEC_GET_BY_IDX(), with a fallback to a default value.

simplesect.para: Static initializer for a struct dac_dt_spec for the property, or default_value if the node or property do not exist.

briefdescription.para: Get DAC io-channel information from a DT_DRV_COMPAT devicetree instance.

simplesect.para: Static initializer for an dac_dt_spec structure.

briefdescription.para: Like DAC_DT_SPEC_INST_GET_BY_IDX(), with a fallback to a default value.

simplesect.para: Static initializer for a struct dac_dt_spec for the property, or default_value if the node or property do not exist.

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to DAC_DT_SPEC_GET_BY_IDX(node_id, 0).

simplesect.para: Static initializer for an dac_dt_spec structure.

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to DAC_DT_SPEC_GET_BY_IDX_OR(node_id, 0, default_value).

simplesect.para: Static initializer for a struct dac_dt_spec for the property, or default_value if the node or property do not exist.

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to DAC_DT_SPEC_INST_GET_BY_IDX(inst, 0).

simplesect.para: Static initializer for an dac_dt_spec structure.

briefdescription.para: Equivalent to DAC_DT_SPEC_INST_GET_BY_IDX_OR(inst, 0, default).

simplesect.para: Static initializer for a struct dac_dt_spec for the property, or default_value if the node or property do not exist.

briefdescription.para: Interfaces for Digital-to-Analog Converters.
